_comment: Throwaway PREVIEW deployment on Base mainnet (chainId 8453) — a mimic ERC-721 + the on-chain renderer, all 10,000 minted, for viewing on OpenSea. Not the real collection.
verified: live: gateway resolves web3:// -> raw JSON; decoded on-chain SVG is pixel-exact to canonical PNGs for #1, #751, #101, #9845
